title: Pass 3 decision: code is materially improved but 4 P1 bugs remain unfiled before this pass
description: Pass 3 review summary. Code quality is substantially higher than pass 1 baseline. Passes 1 and 2 fixed 36+12 issues including the worst XSS, SSRF, timing oracle, and data integrity bugs. New findings in pass 3: P1 bugs (3): Follow object URI not validated against this server's domain (broadside-3ctt.5); Accept dispatch blocks inbox handler synchronously (broadside-3ctt.6); inbox_uri from actor document not SSRF-checked before storage and dispatch (broadside-3ctt.7); timing side-channel regression from pass-1 fix — length check leaks before ct_eq (broadside-3ctt.14). P2 bugs (4): SQLite foreign keys not enabled (broadside-3ctt.8); watch.rs unwrap_or_default on file_name (broadside-3ctt.9); test TOCTOU port race (broadside-3ctt.10); IPv6 SSRF guard misses ULA/link-local/mapped (broadside-3ctt.12); poll_all no timeout (broadside-3ctt.15). P3 issues (3): NULL source_ref dedup footgun (broadside-3ctt.11); missing test coverage for webhook/ratelimit/sanitize/Follow/Undo (broadside-3ctt.13); delivery_queue missing post_id index (broadside-3ctt.16). The Accept-blocking and timing-oracle regression (broadside-3ctt.14) are the most urgent — both affect production behavior under adversarial input.
close_reason: Pass 3 fixes: HMAC key compare, inbox SSRF guard, domain validation, async Accept dispatch, foreign keys, IPv6 SSRF, poll timeout. Remaining P2-P3 accepted as known debt.
